name: HWR_XP_ATTACHMENT_B
description: This is the table for the experience store attachments.

columns.Name: ATTACHMENT_ID
columns.Comments: The Unique database identifier for this attachment.

columns.Name: USAGE_TYPE_IRI
columns.Comments: The usage type iri for this attachment.

columns.Name: CONTENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: The content type of the attachment.

columns.Name: CONTENT
columns.Comments: The content of the attachment as binary data.

columns.Name: LENGTH
columns.Comments: The lenght in bytes of the attachment.

columns.Name: SHA2
columns.Comments: The computed sha2 of the attachment.

columns.Name: FILE_URL
columns.Comments: The url of the file for this attachment.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
